message:
chore(beads): Enhance bd-19y9 EPIC beads with comprehensive specifications

Enhanced beads for ACFS Installer Reliability EPIC:
- bd-19y9.1.1: Added serde_yaml dependency, dev deps, CI workflow
- bd-19y9.1.2: Streaming output, exponential backoff, RAII cleanup
- bd-19y9.1.6: Batched writing, metrics, configurable formats
- bd-19y9.1.7: Test fixtures, mock containers
- bd-19y9.1.8: 12 E2E test cases with assertion library
- bd-19y9.1.9: NEW checksums.yaml parser module
- bd-19y9.2.2: Dry-run mode, validation workflow
- bd-19y9.2.3: Detailed audit logging, per-project script
- bd-19y9.3.1: Enhanced unattended-upgrades fix with JSON detection
- bd-19y9.3.2: nvm/pyenv fix with verified backup system
- bd-19y9.3.3: Atomic writes, file locking, SHA256 backup verification
- bd-19y9.3.6: Complete test framework with unit/integration/E2E
- bd-19y9.3.7: NEW doctor integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
